title: Odisha 10th result 2026 highlights: Results out, download marksheet at bseodisha.nic.in; 95.33% students pass exam
description: Odisha 10th result 2026 highlights: Odisha board class 10 results were declared on May 2. The percentage of students who cleared exams is 95.33. Students can check results at bseodisha.ac.in and bseodisha.nic.in. Results of the Class 12 examination will be released by the third week of May.
